subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend! Your letter was received. Due to lack of time, the response is being written with utmost brevity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار روحانی نامه شما رسید از عدم فرصت بنهایت اختصار جواب مرقوم میگردد نامه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @poems and quotation from poetry, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
